title: Maverick 510 9 inch 1.75" dia Paint Roller Frame HEADLOCK Pro System Professional Screw Theaded Pole Compatible
features: Are you looking for a 9 x 1.75" paint roller frame that maximises your productivity? Would prefer roller covers to lock onto the frame during use? Would you prefer quick mess free cover release?
This Maverick roller frame is the worlds-first with HEADLOCK PRO technology. A low rotational friction cartridge system locks roller covers in place during use and releases covers with just a pinch.
Expect less mess and more efficiency as cover corrections are resigned to history. A high comfort handle is attached to a premium grade black stainless steel shank for long-lasting performance.
The HEADLOCK PRO system is a professional suite of products which include the Maverick 512 Drill-Powered Paint Roller Spin Cleaner and the Maverick 512 Replacement Cartridge Pack (sold separately)

Say goodbye to the mess of handling covers and conquer all with a more powerful and more engaging paint roller system built on HEADLOCK PRO technology. Start building our your HEADLOCK PRO system now.
For the avoidance of doubt the selling unit is a single 9” roller frame. All other images show the other accessories available from Maverick.
description: From the manufacturer MAVERICK delivers exceptional work solutions to every decorator seeking to perform at their best. Like you, are in pursuit of excellence. We’re unafraid to be different. We learn from the best and discover the change you never knew you needed and can't imagine being without. We forge a path that others will follow with admiration. Maverick is more than outstanding decorators' tools. It’s a mindset. Choose Maverick to gain a significant advantage. HEADLOCK PRO System CONQUER ALL | Meet your own high standards The HEADLOCK PRO system was born to finally solve the everyday frustrations of decorators. The Maverick frame is the world's first with HEADLOCK Pro technology and features a low rotational friction cartridge system that locks roller covers in place during use and releases covers with just a pinch. Expect less mess and more efficiency as cover corrections are resigned to history. Compatible with Maverick Series V 9" roller covers. Greater comfort and control Lasting performance Threaded handle for optional extension Maximise productivity and minimise mess Maverick HEADLOCK PRO 510 9" Roller Frame 1.75" Maximise productivity The HEADLOCK PRO system locks on roller covers during use and features rapid pinch release. Reduce mess Cover corrections are resigned to history and roller release is achieved with a just a pinch. Lasting performance Sturdily built and designed to withstand the demands of everyday professional use. Threaded handle for optional extension An integrated screw-threaded handle is compatible with extension poles for improved leverage and at-height work.
